name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES state, turn


(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                            /\ turn = p
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
                            /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process is in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : (p # q) => (state[p] # "critical" \/ state[q] # "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants, PrepareMsg, VoteYesMsg, VoteNoMsg, CommitMsg, AbortMsg, AllMsgs
VARIABLES coordinatorState, messages, participantStates

    /\ coordinatorState = Init
    /\ \A p \in Participants: participantStates[p] = Init
    /\ messages = {}

Next ==
    \/ /\ coordinatorState = Init
       /\ messages' = {PrepareMsg}
       /\ coordinatorState' = WaitingForVotes
       /\ \A p \in Participants: participantStates'[p] = Init
    \/ /\ coordinatorState = WaitingForVotes
       /\ \E p \in Participants: participantStates[p] = Init
       /\ messages' = {VoteYesMsg}
       /\ participantStates'[p] = VotingYes
    \/ /\ coordinatorState = WaitingForVotes
       /\ \E p \in Participants: participantStates[p] = Init
       /\ messages' = {VoteNoMsg}
       /\ participantStates'[p] = VotingNo
    \/ /\ coordinatorState = WaitingForVotes
       /\ \A p \in Participants: participantStates[p] = VotingYes
       /\ messages' = {CommitMsg}
       /\ coordinatorState' = Commit
    \/ /\ coordinatorState = WaitingForVotes
       /\ \E p \in Participants: participantStates[p] = VotingNo
       /\ messages' = {AbortMsg}
       /\ coordinatorState' = Abort
    \/ /\ coordinatorState = Commit
       /\ messages' = {}
       /\ \A p \in Participants: participantStates'[p] = Commit
    \/ /\ coordinatorState = Abort
       /\ messages' = {}
       /\ \A p \in Participants: participantStates'[p] = Abort

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N)+1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Acceptors, BallotSet, Proposers, ValueSet

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenValue, chosenBallotValue
Ballot == <<Int, Int>>  \* Pair of (proposer ID, round number)
BallotValue == <<Int, Value>>  \* Pair of (ballot, value)
Value == <<Int, Int>>  \* Pair of (proposer ID, value ID)

\* Initial state
Init == /\ acceptors = Acceptors
        /\ proposers = Proposers
        /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> <<0, <<0, 0>>>>]
        /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> <<0, <<0, 0>>>>]
        /\ chosen = {}
        /\ chosenBallot = [v \in ValueSet |-> <<0, 0>>]
        /\ chosenValue = [b \in BallotSet |-> <<0, 0>>]
        /\ chosenBallotValue = [b \in BallotSet |-> <<0, 0>>]
        /\ chosenBallotValue' = [b \in BallotSet |-> <<0, 0>>]
        /\ promises' = [a \in acceptors |-> <<0, <<0, 0>>>>]
        /\ accepts' = [a \in acceptors |-> <<0, <<0, 0>>>>]
        /\ chosen' = {}
        /\ chosenBallot' = [v \in ValueSet |-> <<0, 0>>]
        /\ chosenValue' = [b \in BallotSet |-> <<0, 0>>]
        /\ chosenBallotValue' = [b \in BallotSet |-> <<0, 0>>]

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
  \/ /\ \E p \in proposers : \E r \in Int :
      /\ promises' = [a \in acceptors |-> 

            IF promises[a][1][1] >= r THEN promises[a]


      /\ accepts' = accepts
      /\ chosen' = chosen
      /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
      /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
      /\ chosenBallotValue' = chosenBallotValue
  \/ /\ \E p \in proposers : \E r \in Int : \E v \in ValueSet :
      /\ \E a \in acceptors :
          /\ accepts' = [a \in acceptors |-> 
              IF a = a THEN <<r, v>> ELSE accepts[a]]
          /\ promises' = promises
          /\ chosen' = chosen
          /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
          /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
          /\ chosenBallotValue' = chosenBallotValue
  \/ /\ \E a \in acceptors : \E r \in Int : \E v \in ValueSet :
      /\ \E b \in BallotSet :
          /\ chosenBallotValue' = [b \in BallotSet |-> 
              IF b = b THEN v ELSE chosenBallotValue[b]]
          /\ chosenBallot' = [v \in ValueSet |-> 
              IF v = v THEN r ELSE chosenBallot[v]]
          /\ chosenValue' = [b \in BallotSet |-> 
              IF b = b THEN v ELSE chosenValue[b]]
          /\ chosen' = chosen \cup {v}
          /\ promises' = promises
          /\ accepts' = accepts
  \/ /\ \E a \in acceptors :
      /\ promises' = promises
      /\ accepts' = accepts
      /\ chosen' = chosen
      /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
      /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
      /\ chosenBallotValue' = chosenBallotValue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ proposers \in SUBSET Proposers
          /\ promises \in [a \in acceptors |-> BallotValue]
          /\ accepts \in [a \in acceptors |-> BallotValue]
          /\ chosen \in SUBSET ValueSet
          /\ chosenBallot \in [v \in ValueSet |-> Ballot]
          /\ chosenValue \in [b \in BallotSet |-> Value]
          /\ chosenBallotValue \in [b \in BallotSet |-> Value]
          /\ chosenBallotValue' \in [b \in BallotSet |-> Value]
          /\ promises' \in [a \in acceptors |-> BallotValue]
          /\ accepts' \in [a \in acceptors |-> BallotValue]
          /\ chosen' \in SUBSET ValueSet
          /\ chosenBallot' \in [v \in ValueSet |-> Ballot]
          /\ chosenValue' \in [b \in BallotSet |-> Value]
          /\ chosenBallotValue' \in [b \in BallotSet |-> Value]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> 0]

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = IF lastChunk \in sentChunks THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE 0
    /\ channelState' = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF i = lastChunk THEN 1 ELSE channelState[i]]
    /\ lastChunk \in 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ lastChunk \notin sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets' = [j \in 1..N |-> offsets[j] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[j])]
        /\ clocks' = [j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j] + offsets[j]]

Avg(c) == (1 \div N) * \Sum i \in 1..N : c[i]

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ \A i \in 1..N : i \in 1..N

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = infected
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ i \in 1..N
                           /\ known' = known \cup <<i>>
                           /\ infected' = infected \cup <<i>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
       \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free'

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1} \cup {0, 1} \cup {0, 1} \cup {0, 1}
        /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = <<TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE>>
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE>>
        \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE>>
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE>>
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1} \cup {0, 1} \cup {0, 1} \cup {0, 1}
          /\ turn' \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants' \in {0, 1} \cup {0, 1} \cup {0, 1} \cup {0, 1}
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
